Israeli drone strike wounds paramedics in southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli drone strike wounds paramedics in southern Lebanon An Israeli drone strike has wounded several paramedics in southern Lebanon, the National News Agency (NNA) reported. According to the NNA, the missile struck a Civil Defence vehicle operated by the Islamic Health Authority on the road linking Nabatieh al-Fawqa and Dar al-Mu’allimin, injuring the crew. The agency said the strike took place as Israeli artillery heavily shelled Ali al-Taher hill on the outskirts of Nabatieh al-Fawqa.

articles.title: Trump says he is considering restarting major combat operations in Iran
articles.summary: Trump says he is considering restarting major combat operations in Iran US President Donald Trump told Axios in an interview on Thursday that he is seriously considering restarting major combat operations in Iran, which could include larger strikes than those carried out during "Operation Epic Fury", the news outlet reported. "They haven't received enough pain yet," Axios quoted Trump as saying, adding that Trump said he had not yet made a final decision. US strikes have killed at least 53 people, including three children, since 27 June, according to Al Jazeera.

articles.summary: Qatar condemns Houthi attack on Saudi vessel The Qatari foreign ministry has released a statement denouncing the Houthi attack on a Saudi Arabian vessel in the Red Sea. "Qatar strongly condemns the Houthis' targeting of a Saudi vessel while it was sailing in the Red Sea, and it considers it a grave violation of international freedom of navigation," the ministry said in the statement. "The Ministry of Foreign Affairs reaffirms the State of Qatar's solidarity with the sisterly Kingdom of Saudi Arabia," the statement added.
